products.name: Home Discovery Platform

interfaces.name: B2C Web Application
interfaces.description: Primary browser-based interface for property search, listing evaluation, alerts management, and contact flows.

interfaces.name: iOS Application
interfaces.description: Native iOS experience for search, saved alerts, push notifications, and inquiry management.

interfaces.name: Android Application
interfaces.description: Native Android experience aligned with iOS feature set.

interfaces.name: Email Alert System
interfaces.description: Transactional and behavioral email alerts for saved searches and inquiry updates.

interfaces.name: Push Notification Service
interfaces.description: Mobile push notifications for new matches and response updates.

interfaces.name: Search Engine (SEO)
interfaces.description: Organic search entry point where indexed property, area, and content pages drive discovery traffic back to the platform.

interfaces.name: Social Media
interfaces.description: Social platforms where shareable widgets and real estate information posts link users back to the platform.

interfaces.name: Mortgage Integration API
interfaces.description: API integration with financing partners for affordability calculation and prequalification.

interfaces.name: Listing Data API
interfaces.description: Controlled API access for ecosystem partners to retrieve listing and availability data.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Drives discovery entry points and routes seekers into search and property exploration journeys.
Provides the shared B2C web shell needed for the browser-based seeker experience.
Core search and filtering capability behind property discovery.
Supports saved searches, email alerts, and push-driven match notifications.
Powers detailed listing evaluation pages with photos, descriptions, and seller/agent context.
Enables inquiry submission and contact flows from seekers to owners or agencies.
Matches the planned mortgage integration and affordability / prequalification experience.
Supports favorites, saved items, and personal seeker workspace functions.
Stores and manages seeker identity and preference data used across search and alerts.
Provides the shared foundation for iOS and Android delivery.
Back-end notification delivery capability for transactional and behavioral alerts.
Supports location-based search, map interactions, and distance/address features.
Supplies normalized property facts needed for listing detail and filtering.
Determines ranking and visibility order of listings in discovery surfaces.
Improves matching of new listings to seeker interests and alerts.
Needed for account login and secure access to saved searches and portal features.
Manages account lifecycle and permissions for seeker users.
Needed for consent, privacy operations, and compliant customer-data handling.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: This mapping is inferred by aligning the product description, interfaces, and customer journey with the capability catalog.

products.name: Owner Platform

interfaces.name: Owner Web Application
interfaces.description: Browser-based dashboard for valuation, listing creation, performance tracking, and lead management.

interfaces.name: Owner iOS Application
interfaces.description: Mobile-optimized access to listing management and inquiry monitoring.

interfaces.name: Owner Android Application
interfaces.description: Mobile-optimized access to listing management and inquiry monitoring.

interfaces.name: Performance Analytics Dashboard
interfaces.description: Analytics interface displaying listing views, inquiries, pricing insights, and conversion signals.

interfaces.name: Agent Handoff API
interfaces.description: Structured routing interface to transfer high-intent owners to professional agents.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Captures owner intent and valuation input at the start of the supply journey.
Provides price visualization and market guidance for self-serve owners.
Fits the guided owner journey around pricing, readiness, and next best actions.
Supports self-serve listing creation for sellers and landlords.
Lets owners manage the listings they created, including status and edits.
Gives owners a property-centric workspace built from their known assets and estimations.
Needed if the landlord side of the console expands into dedicated rental workflows.
Acts as the logged-in portal shell for owner account and listing functions.
Provides the valuation logic behind estimate and pricing guidance features.
Supplies property-level facts that owners expect to review and correct.
Adds market context, pricing insights, and comparables for owner decisions.
Supports handoff and tracking of high-intent owners routed to professional agents.
Useful for assigning owner leads to the right agency or agent during handoff.
Needed for secure owner login and access to private management tools.
Supports account administration for individual sellers and landlords.
Provides the web framework underpinning the owner-facing console.
Ensures consistent owner UX across listing, valuation, and analytics screens.
Supports performance dashboards for views, inquiries, pricing insight, and conversion signals.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: This mapping is inferred by aligning the product description, interfaces, and customer journey with the capability catalog.

products.name: Pro Agency Platform

interfaces.name: Pro Portal
interfaces.description: Primary B2B web interface for listing lifecycle management, visibility control, and lead handling.

interfaces.name: Listing Ingestion API
interfaces.description: API for bulk listing upload and synchronization with agency systems.

interfaces.name: CRM Integration API
interfaces.description: Bidirectional integration interface for lead and listing synchronization with external CRMs.

interfaces.name: ROI & Performance Dashboard
interfaces.description: Analytics interface showing lead performance, response time, ranking exposure, and ROI metrics.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides the B2B shell, navigation, and shared experience foundation for agency users.
Supports agency-side creation and editing of listings in the pro portal.
Provides bulk and day-to-day management of the agency listing portfolio.
Controls listing visibility, boosts, and publication settings.
Provides listing-level analytics that feed ROI and performance dashboards.
Matches the lead handling needs of agencies receiving buyer inquiries.
Helps agencies attribute inbound calls and measure lead-generation effectiveness.
Supports management of seller-side opportunities generated through the platform.
Represents agency identity publicly and supports agency profile management.
Supports paid and organic visibility controls for agencies themselves.
Adds trust and reputation signals valuable in a professional agency product.
Fits the listing ingestion API and bulk synchronization use case.
Supports structured integrations with CRMs and external agency systems.
Useful when agencies need outbound feeds to partners and downstream systems.
Supports valuation and prospect-winning workflows for agencies.
Adds prospecting intelligence to help agencies grow inventory.
Extends visibility through external advertising channels.
Natural analytics service for agency-level ROI and business reporting.
Provides a durable source of truth for agency/legal-entity data in B2B workflows.
Supports multi-user agency account administration and role management.
Useful for downloadable PDFs and other structured agency artifacts.

interfaces.name: Identity Graph Service
interfaces.description: Centralized identity and entity resolution service for seekers, owners, agents, and households.

interfaces.name: Ratings & Review Service
interfaces.description: Cross-platform service managing agent and intermediary feedback data.

interfaces.name: Ranking & Boost Engine
interfaces.description: Core service controlling listing visibility, sort order, and monetized boosts.

interfaces.name: Advertising Delivery Engine
interfaces.description: Ad placement and yield optimization system across web and mobile.

enrichmentMetadata.note: Capabilities were added as inferred product needs with a short rationale for each mapping.
